category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to South Africa) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-South Africa Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入南非：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入南非：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against South African requirements: NRCS Letter of Authority where a Compulsory Specification applies, SANS IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC and SANS energy/marking obligations, UN 38.3 transport, in-country importer, and e-waste EPR under the National Environmental Management Waste Act.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与南非要求对照：适用强制规范时的NRCS许可证（LOA）、SANS IEC 62133电芯安全、EMC及SANS能效/标识义务、UN 38.3运输、境内进口商，以及《国家环境管理：废物法》下的电子废物EPR。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與南非要求對照：適用強制規範時的NRCS許可證（LOA）、SANS IEC 62133電芯安全、EMC及SANS能效/標識義務、UN 38.3運輸、境內進口商，以及《國家環境管理：廢物法》下的電子廢物EPR。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, NRCS determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、NRCS裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、NRCS裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters selling into South Africa must work through an in-country importer, obtain an NRCS Letter of Authority where the product falls under a Compulsory Specification (VC), build safety evidence to SANS IEC 62133, meet UN 38.3 for transport, and account for e-waste EPR under South African waste law — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification alone.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商进入南非市场，须通过境内进口商运作，在产品属于强制规范（VC）范围时取得NRCS许可证（LOA），依SANS IEC 62133建立安全证据，满足UN 38.3运输要求，并就南非废物法下的电子废物EPR作出安排——上述要求均无法仅凭中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商進入南非市場，須透過境內進口商運作，在產品屬於強制規範（VC）範圍時取得NRCS許可證（LOA），依SANS IEC 62133建立安全證據，滿足UN 38.3運輸要求，並就南非廢物法下的電子廢物EPR作出安排——上述要求均無法僅憑中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from nrcs.org.za, sabs.co.za, gov.za, icasa.org.za, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet South African requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足南非锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足南非鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. South Africa references SANS IEC 62133 (the national adoption of IEC 62133) for portable lithium cell and pack safety. Where the product falls under an applicable Compulsory Specification, an NRCS Letter of Authority is required before sale. A GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient, and goods must be imported through an in-country importer of record.
a.zh: 不。南非便携式锂电芯及电池组安全引用SANS IEC 62133（IEC 62133的国家采用版）。当产品属于适用强制规范范围时，须在销售前取得NRCS许可证（LOA）。仅凭GB 31241测试报告不足以满足要求，且货物须通过境内进口商（记录进口商）进口。
a.zht: 不。南非便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全引用SANS IEC 62133（IEC 62133的國家採用版）。當產品屬於適用強制規範範圍時，須在銷售前取得NRCS許可證（LOA）。僅憑GB 31241測試報告不足以滿足要求，且貨物須透過境內進口商（記錄進口商）進口。

q.en: What does the NRCS Letter of Authority process require?
q.zh: NRCS许可证（LOA）流程有哪些要求？
q.zht: NRCS許可證（LOA）流程有哪些要求？

a.en: Where a product is covered by a Compulsory Specification (VC) administered by the NRCS, the importer or manufacturer must apply for a Letter of Authority before the product is sold or imported into South Africa. The application typically requires test reports against the referenced SANS standard, technical documentation, and details of a South African importer or local representative. South Africa has no single EU-style battery regulation; obligations come from NRCS Compulsory Specifications, SANS standards, and e-waste EPR under national waste law.
a.zh: 当产品被NRCS管理的强制规范（VC）覆盖时，进口商或制造商须在产品于南非销售或进口前申请许可证（LOA）。申请通常需提供依据所引用SANS标准的测试报告、技术文件，以及南非进口商或本地代表的信息。南非没有等同于欧盟的单一电池法规；相关义务来自NRCS强制规范、SANS标准及国家废物法下的电子废物EPR。
a.zht: 當產品被NRCS管理的強制規範（VC）覆蓋時，進口商或製造商須在產品於南非銷售或進口前申請許可證（LOA）。申請通常需提供依據所引用SANS標準的測試報告、技術文件，以及南非進口商或本地代表的資訊。南非沒有等同於歐盟的單一電池法規；相關義務來自NRCS強制規範、SANS標準及國家廢物法下的電子廢物EPR。
